deleteDialog.title: Delete Profile
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

empty.title: No stories yet
empty.hint: Create your first story to get started

createDialog.title: Create New Story
createDialog.description: Create a new story to organize your voice generations into conversations.

editDialog.title: Edit Story
editDialog.description: Update the story name and description.

deleteDialog.title: Are you sure?
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete the story and all its items. This action cannot be undone.

selectStory.title: Select a story
selectStory.hint: Choose a story from the list to view its content

notFound.title: Story not found
notFound.hint: The selected story could not be loaded

empty.title: No items in this story
empty.hint: Generate speech using the box below to add items

deleteDialog.title: Delete Generation
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete this generation from "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

clearFailedDialog.title: Clear failed generations
clearFailedDialog.body_one: This will permanently delete {{count}} failed generation from your history. This cannot be undone.
clearFailedDialog.body_other: This will permanently delete {{count}} failed generations from your history. This cannot be undone.

importDialog.title: Import Generation
importDialog.body: Import the generation from "{{name}}". This will add it to your history.

effectsDialog.title: Apply Effects
effectsDialog.body: Configure post-processing effects to apply to this generation. A new version will be created.

instruct.placeholder: Delivery instructions — e.g. Speak slowly with warmth, Authoritative and clear…

import.dialogDescription: Import the profile from "{{name}}". This will create a new profile with all samples.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for Voicebox.

serverUrl.title: Server URL
serverUrl.description: The address of your voicebox backend server.

keepServerRunning.title: Keep server running when app closes
keepServerRunning.description: The server will continue running in the background after closing the app.
keepServerRunning.failedDescription: Could not sync setting to backend.
keepServerRunning.runningDescription: Server will continue running when app closes
keepServerRunning.stoppedDescription: Server will stop when app closes

networkAccess.title: Allow network access
networkAccess.description: Makes the server accessible from other devices on your network. Restart the app after changing.
networkAccess.enabled: Network access enabled. Restart the app to apply.
networkAccess.disabled: Network access disabled. Restart the app to apply.

devMode.title: Development mode
devMode.description: Auto-updates are disabled in development mode.

download.title: Update to {{version}}
download.description: Download and install the latest version.

ready.title: Update ready to install
ready.description: Version {{version}} has been downloaded. Restart to complete.

api.title: API Access
api.description: Integrate Voicebox into your workflow via the REST API at {{url}}

generation.title: Generation
generation.description: Controls for long text generation. These settings apply to all engines.

chunkLimit.title: Auto-chunking limit
chunkLimit.description: Long text is split into chunks at sentence boundaries. Lower values can improve quality for long outputs.

crossfade.title: Chunk crossfade
crossfade.description: Blends audio between chunks to smooth transitions. Set to 0 for a hard cut.

normalize.title: Normalize audio
normalize.description: Adjusts output volume to a consistent level across generations.

autoplay.title: Autoplay on generate
autoplay.description: Automatically play audio when a generation completes.

folder.title: Generations folder
folder.description: Where generated audio files are stored on disk.

cuda.title: CUDA Backend
cuda.description: NVIDIA GPU acceleration via a downloadable CUDA backend.

download.title: Download CUDA backend
download.description: ~2.4 GB download. Requires an NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support.

switchToCuda.title: Switch to CUDA backend
switchToCuda.description: CUDA backend is downloaded and ready. Restart to enable.

switchToCpu.title: Switch to CPU backend
switchToCpu.description: Disable GPU acceleration. You can re-download CUDA later.

remove.title: Remove CUDA backend
remove.description: Delete the downloaded CUDA binary to free disk space.

gpu.footer: Voicebox automatically detects and uses the best available GPU on your system. On Apple Silicon Macs, the MLX backend runs natively on the Neural Engine and GPU via Metal Performance Shaders (MPS), with no additional setup required. On Windows and Linux with NVIDIA GPUs, you can download an optional CUDA backend for hardware-accelerated inference. AMD ROCm, Intel XPU, and DirectML are also supported where available through PyTorch. When no GPU is detected, Voicebox falls back to CPU — all engines still work, just slower.

logs.title: Server Logs
logs.devHint: Server logs are only captured when the app manages the server process (production builds).

about.tagline: The open-source voice synthesis studio. Clone voices, generate speech, apply effects, and build voice-powered apps — all running locally on your machine.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Download and manage AI models for voice generation and transcription

problems.title: Problems
problems.noDetails: No error details available. Try downloading again.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Model
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
deleteDialog.sizeNote: This will free up {{size}} of disk space. The model will need to be re-downloaded if you want to use it again.

migrateDialog.title: Move models to new location?
migrateDialog.description: The server will shut down while models are being moved to the new folder. It will restart automatically once the migration is complete.

migrate.title: Moving models
migrate.offline: The server is offline while models are being moved.

toast.cancelFailedDescription: Could not cancel the download task.
toast.resetToDefault: Reset to default location. Restarting server…
toast.noModelsToMigrateDescription: Download at least one model before changing the storage location.
